name: goreleaser
description: GoReleaser is a release automation tool for Go projects

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print detailed debugging output during resource operations

name: -f
--config
options.description: Configuration from file (default ".goreleaser.yaml")

options.name: --rm-dist
options.description: Removes the dist folder

name: -p
--parallelism
options.description: Amount tasks to run concurrently (default: number of CPUs)

options.name: --skip-validate
options.description: Skips several sanity checks

options.name: --snapshot
options.description: Generate an unversioned snapshot build, skipping all validations

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout to the entire build process (default 30m0s)

options.name: --id
options.description: Builds only the specified build id

name: -o
--output
options.description: Copy the binary to the path after the build. Only taked into account when using --single-target and a single id (either with --id or if config only has one build)

options.name: --single-target
options.description: Builds only for current GOOS and GOARCH

options.name: --skip-post-hooks
options.description: Skips all post-build hooks

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print detailed debugging output during resource operations

name: -f
--config
options.description: Configuration from file (default ".goreleaser.yaml")

name: -q
--quiet
options.description: Quiet mode: no output

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for bash

options.name: --no-descriptions
options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for fish

options.name: --no-descriptions
options.description: Disable completion descriptions

subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for powershell

options.name: --no-descriptions
options.description: Disable completion descriptions

options.description: Disable completion descriptions

options.description: Print detailed debugging output during resource operations

name: -o
--output
options.description: Where to save the json schema (default "-")

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print detailed debugging output during resource operations

name: -f
--config
options.description: Configuration from file (default ".goreleaser.yaml")

name: -p
--parallelism
options.description: Amount tasks to run concurrently (default: number of CPUs)

options.name: --rm-dist
options.description: Removes the dist folder

options.name: --skip-validate
options.description: Skips several sanity checks

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout to the entire build process (default 30m0s)

options.name: --snapshot
options.description: Generate an unversioned snapshot build, skipping all validations

options.name: --auto-snapshot
options.description: Automatically sets --snapshot if the repo is dirty

options.name: --release-footer
options.description: Load custom release notes footer from a markdown file

options.name: --release-footer-tmpl
options.description: Load custom release notes footer from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-footer)

options.name: --release-header
options.description: Load custom release notes header from a markdown file

options.name: --release-header-tmpl
options.description: Load custom release notes header from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-header)

options.name: --release-notes
options.description: Load custom release notes from a markdown file (will skip GoReleaser changelog generation)

options.name: --release-notes-tmpl
options.description: Load custom release notes from a templated markdown file (overrides --release-notes)

options.name: --skip-announce
options.description: Skips announcing releases (implies --skip-validate)

options.name: --skip-publish
options.description: Skips publishing artifacts

options.name: --skip-sbom
options.description: Skips cataloging artifacts

options.name: --skip-sign
options.description: Skips signing artifacts

name: --help
-h
options.description: Help for goreleaser

name: --version
-v
options.description: Version for goreleaser
